title: United States Statement Regarding a Valid Lost or Stolen Passport Book and/or Card (Form DS-64)
description: Report a valid U.S. passport book and/or card as lost or stolen, using the data model of Form DS-64 (Statement Regarding a Valid Lost or Stolen U.S. Passport Book and/or Card). Filing this form electronically cancels the reported passport in the Consular Lost and Stolen Passport System (CLASP), so it can no longer be used for travel; a bearer who later travels on a reported-lost passport may be detained on U.S. entry. If the applicant is also applying for a new passport (the common case), Form DS-64 is submitted together with Form DS-11 (see us/dos/passport-application-ds11); if not, it is mailed to CLASP with a photocopy of a valid government-issued photo ID, or reported online/by phone at travel.state.gov. If the lost/stolen passport is already expired, it is no longer valid and this form is not needed. It does not submit the report; the live U.S. Department of State source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

authority.name: U.S. Department of State, Bureau of Consular Affairs

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the live Form DS-64 PDF at eforms.state.gov (fetched directly; no access block encountered, consistent with the sibling DS-11/DS-82 documents also sourced from state.gov). Page 2 of the PDF (the actual data-collection fields) extracted cleanly; some of page 1's boilerplate/legal text extracted with font-encoding artifacts (a custom-glyph substitution common in this PDF's generation tool) that scrambled some letters in the instructions and Privacy Act statement — this did not affect the field labels themselves, which were legible and are what this schema is built from. Not a time-versioned/edition form: a lost/stolen-passport report is a one-time event per incident, not filed 'for' a recurring period, so it is authored at the plain (non-edition) registry path per the GSP-0005 §2 coexistence test. Status remains 'draft' pending full independent field-by-field source review. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: passportBookStatus
fields.label: Valid U.S. Passport Book — status being reported
fields.description: not_applicable if the applicant is not reporting a passport book. At least one of passportBookStatus or passportCardStatus must be lost or stolen.

fields.name: passportCardStatus
fields.label: Valid U.S. Passport Card — status being reported
fields.description: not_applicable if the applicant is not reporting a passport card. The passport book and card have different numbers; at least one of passportBookStatus or passportCardStatus must be lost or stolen.

fields.name: isConnectedToNewApplication
fields.label: Are you submitting this form in connection with an application for a new U.S. passport book and/or card?
fields.description: If true, submit this form together with Form DS-11 (Application for a U.S. Passport). If false, mail this form alone with a front-and-back photocopy of a valid government-issued photo ID to the Consular Lost and Stolen Passport Unit (CLASP), or report online or by phone instead.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: nameChangedSincePassportIssued
fields.label: Has your name changed since the passport was issued?
fields.description: If true, also give nameAtPassportIssuance.

fields.name: nameAtPassportIssuance
fields.label: Name in which the valid lost or stolen passport was issued
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when nameChangedSincePassportIssued is true.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth
fields.description: City & state if in the U.S., or city & country if born abroad.

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: Social Security number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 9 digits, no separators. Providing the SSN is voluntary per the form's Disclosure notice, but is used to verify the identity of the person reporting the lost/stolen passport and to identify the passport being reported; failure to provide it may result in processing delays.

fields.name: currentAddressLine1
fields.label: Current address
fields.description: Street address.

fields.name: currentAddressCity
fields.label: Current address — city
fields.description: City of the applicant's current address.

fields.name: currentAddressState
fields.label: Current address — state
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation. Not applicable to a foreign address; see currentAddressCountry instead.

fields.name: currentAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Current address — ZIP code
fields.description: 5-digit or ZIP+4 U.S. format if in the U.S.; the form also permits a foreign postal code here for an address outside the U.S. (see currentAddressCountry).

fields.name: currentAddressCountry
fields.label: Current address — country (if outside the U.S.)
fields.description: Required only when the current address is outside the United States.

fields.name: telephoneNumber
fields.label: Telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234.

fields.name: alternateTelephoneNumber
fields.label: Alternate telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: lossOrTheftExplanation
fields.label: Explain in detail how your valid U.S. passport book/card was lost or stolen
fields.description: Answer completely; if the exact circumstances are unknown, be as exact as possible.

fields.name: lossOrTheftLocation
fields.label: Explain where the loss or theft occurred
fields.description: Provide the address if known: city and state if in the U.S., or city and country if known to have occurred abroad.

fields.name: lossOrTheftDate
fields.label: Date the passport book/card was lost or stolen
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. If the exact date is unknown, give the last date the applicant remembers having it in their possession.

fields.name: policeReportFiled
fields.label: Did you file a police report?
fields.description: If true and the report is available, submit a copy with the form.

fields.name: lostPassportBookNumber
fields.label: Lost or stolen passport book number, if known
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Applicable when passportBookStatus is lost or stolen. A reused number cannot be reissued.

fields.name: lostPassportBookIssueDate
fields.label: Lost or stolen passport book — issue date, if known
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Applicable when passportBookStatus is lost or stolen.

fields.name: lostPassportCardNumber
fields.label: Lost or stolen passport card number, if known
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Applicable when passportCardStatus is lost or stolen. The book and card have different numbers.

fields.name: lostPassportCardIssueDate
fields.label: Lost or stolen passport card — issue date, if known
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Applicable when passportCardStatus is lost or stolen.

fields.name: hasOtherLostOrStolenPassports
fields.label: Have you had any other valid U.S. passport book/card lost or stolen?
fields.description: Refers to prior incidents, separate from the one being reported now. If true, also give otherLostPassportCount and otherLostPassportApproximateDates. If more than one valid U.S. passport previously issued to the applicant was lost or stolen, the replacement passport may be limited in validity.

fields.name: otherLostPassportCount
fields.label: How many other passports were lost or stolen?
fields.description: Required when hasOtherLostOrStolenPassports is true.

fields.name: otherLostPassportApproximateDates
fields.label: Approximate date(s) of other lost or stolen passports
fields.description: Required when hasOtherLostOrStolenPassports is true. Free text; the form allows more than one approximate date.

fields.name: otherLostPassportPoliceReportFiled
fields.label: Did you file a police report? (for the other lost or stolen passport(s))
fields.description: Required when hasOtherLostOrStolenPassports is true. If true and the report is available, submit a copy with the form. A distinct field from policeReportFiled: the form has two separate 'Did you file a police report?' questions — this one under the other-lost-passports history question, the other under the current loss/theft-date question.

fields.name: isMinorUnder16
fields.label: Is the person identified on this form a minor under age 16?
fields.description: If true, both parents/legal guardians must sign (see guardianSignatureDate and secondGuardianSignatureDate) instead of the applicant, and a front-and-back photocopy of each signing guardian's ID must accompany the form. If only one parent/guardian has sole legal authority to obtain a passport for the child (22 C.F.R. 51.28), a supporting document (e.g. a court order proving sole legal custody, or Form DS-5525) must be included instead of the second guardian's signature. If false, the applicant signs (see applicantSignatureDate).

fields.name: applicantSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of applicant's signature
fields.description: Required when isMinorUnder16 is false. YYYY-MM-DD. By signing, the applicant declares under penalty of perjury that they have read the warning on page one, the information provided is correct and complete, they have not given the passport to another person or disposed of it in an unauthorized manner, they understand the reported passport(s) will be invalidated, and they will return it to Passport Services if it is subsequently found.

fields.name: guardianSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of first parent/guardian's signature
fields.description: Required when isMinorUnder16 is true, unless the sole-legal-authority exception applies (see isMinorUnder16). YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: secondGuardianSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of second parent/guardian's signature
fields.description: Required when isMinorUnder16 is true and no parent/guardian has sole legal authority under 22 C.F.R. 51.28 (see isMinorUnder16). YYYY-MM-DD.

steps.title: Details of the loss or theft
